blocks.content: She was texting me. In class. From two rows over.
something that was about to change
I looked up. She didn't. She just kept writing. Like she hadn't said anything.

blocks.speaker: Crystal
blocks.content: Not yet. I'm still in it.

blocks.speaker: Ms. Barrett
blocks.content: That's actually exactly where I want you. Stay there.
She kept her eyes on the page. But the corner of her mouth moved. Just barely.
